profile.name: Priyadharsan T
profile.title: Full Stack Developer • Backend Engineer • WebOps Team Lead
profile.tagline: Building scalable backend systems, modern frontend applications, cloud-ready platforms, and practical web solutions using React.js, Node.js, MongoDB, and AWS.

about.title: Full Stack Developer with real-world backend and cloud experience.
paragraphs: I am a B.Tech Artificial Intelligence & Data Science student at Velammal Engineering College with strong skills in backend development, frontend development, AWS Cloud, and scalable web applications.
As Backend TL at WebOps, I work on real college web systems, maintain backend workflows, collaborate with development teams, and contribute to admission portal architecture and automation.
I enjoy building practical systems that are clean, scalable, reliable, and useful for real users while continuously improving my software engineering and problem-solving skills.

skillsIntro: A focused stack for building scalable web applications, backend services, APIs, cloud deployments, and automation workflows.

experience.title: WebOps Backend TL
points: Maintaining and improving the college website backend infrastructure
Building backend features for student-facing and admin-facing workflows
Collaborating with the WebOps team on production website updates and deployments
Contributing to admission portal workflows, automation systems, and data handling
